name: The Ultimate Small Business AI Toolkit
description: The all-in-one AI prompt toolkit for small business owners. Covers marketing, sales, customer service, operations, HR, finance, and more — everything you need to start using AI across your entire business.

name: The Complete Coaching & Consultancy AI Toolkit
description: AI prompts built for coaches and consultants — client onboarding, session prep, proposal writing, follow-ups, content creation, and business development.

name: The Complete Health & Wellness AI Toolkit
description: AI prompts designed for health and wellness businesses — client communications, programme design, marketing content, booking management, and community building.

name: The Complete Manufacturing AI Toolkit
description: AI prompts for manufacturing businesses — supplier communications, quality reporting, SOP generation, workforce scheduling, safety documentation, and process improvement.

name: The Complete AI Email Assistant Toolkit
description: AI prompts to handle every type of business email — enquiries, follow-ups, proposals, complaints, newsletters, cold outreach, and internal communications. Works for any industry.

name: The Complete Beauty & Aesthetics AI Toolkit
description: AI prompts for salons, spas, and aesthetics businesses — client consultations, appointment reminders, social media content, treatment descriptions, review responses, and marketing campaigns.

name: The Complete Content Calendar AI Toolkit
description: AI prompts to plan, create, and schedule content across every platform — blog posts, social media, email newsletters, and video scripts. Includes a full content planning framework.

name: The Complete Early Years & Education AI Toolkit
description: AI prompts for nurseries, childminders, tutors, and education businesses — parent communications, lesson planning, Ofsted prep, marketing, policies, and administration.

name: The Complete Ecommerce & Retail AI Toolkit
description: AI prompts for online and high street retailers — product descriptions, customer emails, inventory management, marketing campaigns, review responses, and seasonal promotions.

name: The Complete Freelancer & Creative AI Toolkit
description: AI prompts for freelancers, designers, writers, and creative professionals — client briefs, proposals, project scoping, invoicing, portfolio content, and self-promotion.

name: The Complete Hospitality & Food Business AI Toolkit
description: AI prompts for restaurants, cafes, pubs, caterers, and food businesses — menu descriptions, customer communications, staff management, marketing, review responses, and event promotion.

name: The Complete HR & People Management AI Toolkit
description: AI prompts for HR managers and business owners handling people — job descriptions, interview questions, onboarding, policies, performance reviews, and employee communications.

name: The Complete Personal Finance & Money Coaching AI Toolkit
description: AI prompts for financial coaches, advisers, and money mentors — client assessments, financial planning content, educational materials, marketing, and client communications.

name: The Complete Pet Business & Veterinary AI Toolkit
description: AI prompts for vets, groomers, pet shops, dog walkers, and pet service businesses — client communications, appointment management, marketing, pet care content, and review responses.

name: The Complete Professional Services AI Toolkit
description: AI prompts for accountants, lawyers, consultants, and professional service firms — client proposals, report writing, compliance documentation, business development, and client communications.

name: The Complete Real Estate & Lettings AI Toolkit
description: AI prompts for estate agents, lettings agents, and property managers — property descriptions, client communications, viewing follow-ups, marketing, tenancy management, and compliance.

name: The Complete Social Media Management AI Toolkit
description: AI prompts to manage social media for any business — content ideas, captions, hashtag strategies, engagement responses, ad copy, analytics interpretation, and platform-specific content.

name: The Complete Trades & Construction AI Toolkit
description: AI prompts for plumbers, electricians, builders, roofers, and construction businesses — quoting, invoicing, customer communications, marketing, H&S documentation, and project management.

name: The Complete Wedding & Events Planning AI Toolkit
description: AI prompts for wedding planners and event coordinators — client communications, vendor management, timelines, social media content, proposals, and day-of coordination.

name: The Complete AI Website Generator Toolkit
description: AI prompts to create every piece of website copy you need — homepage, about page, service pages, FAQs, testimonials, CTAs, meta descriptions, and blog posts. Works for any business.

name: The Complete Customer Service Response AI Toolkit
description: 150 AI prompts across 10 sections covering complaints, enquiries, returns, reviews, retention, trade customers, e-commerce support, proactive service, and handling difficult situations.

name: The Complete Business Audit AI Toolkit
description: A guided AI-powered self-assessment that helps you identify where your business could save the most time. Covers operations, marketing, customer service, finance, and administration.
